name: 5" Glass Plate Candle Holder - Room Essentials™
description:
Effortlessly blending with any decor, the 5" Glass Plate Candle Holder by Room Essentials™ is sleek and simple. The transparent glass enhances the candle's look, adding a minimalist feel to any space. Designed for easy maintenance and cleaning, this glass candle holder from Room Essentials™ ensures a hassle free candlelight experience.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
